member.name: M:MauiApp2.Data.DatabaseInitializer.ActualizarUrlsVideosAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sincroniza URLs de YouTube si la BD ya existía con enlaces anteriores.

member.name: M:MauiApp2.Data.DatabaseInitializer.ActualizarGaleriasAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Migra galerías SVG antiguas a infografías PNG y sincroniza el catálogo.

member.name: M:MauiApp2.Data.DatabaseInitializer.ActualizarJuegosAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Migra juegos internos antiguos a juegos externos del catálogo oficial.

member.name: T:MauiApp2.Data.Seed.GaleriaCatalog
member.summary: Catálogo oficial de galerías educativas con infografías PNG. Alineado con los 6 videos de VideoCatalog.

member.name: T:MauiApp2.Data.Seed.JuegoCatalog
member.summary: Catálogo oficial de juegos educativos externos (Educaplay, calculadoras).

member.name: M:MauiApp2.Data.Seed.JuegoCatalog.EducaplayRecurso
member.remarks:
Pattern:
educaplay\\.com/recursos-educativos/([^?#]+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Yy].
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match '/'.
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Vv].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match '/'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^#?] atomically at least once.

member.name: T:MauiApp2.Data.Seed.VideoCatalog
member.summary: Catálogo oficial de videos educativos de YouTube.

member.name: T:MauiApp2.Services.INavegacionUiService
member.summary: Estado global de visibilidad de la barra de navegación (persistido en el dispositivo).

member.name: T:MauiApp2.Services.ISesionService
member.summary: Guarda el ID del perfil activo en preferencias locales (sin contraseña).

member.name: T:MauiApp2.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EducaplayRecurso_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EducaplayRecurso_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.
